title: Remove, inspect, repair and refit industrial tyres and tubes
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, inspect, repair and refit industrial tyres and tubes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove, repair and refit industrial tyres and tubes

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret tyre and tube remove, inspect, repair and refit information 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret tyre and tube remove, inspect, repair and refit information 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret tyre and tube remove, inspect, repair and refit information 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks, and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove, repair and refit industrial tyres and tubes

elements.title: Remove and inspect tyres, tubes and wheels

pcs.text: Remove tyres and tubes from wheels according to manufacturer procedures, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Inspect tyres, tubes, wheels or rims according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove tyres and tubes from wheels according to manufacturer procedures, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Inspect tyres, tubes, wheels or rims according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove tyres and tubes from wheels according to manufacturer procedures, workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Inspect tyres, tubes, wheels or rims according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Analyse repair options and select those most appropriate to the circumstances according to workplace procedures3.2 Repair tyres and tubes according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Mount tyre to wheel or rim according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures without causing damage to components or systems3.4 Check assembled wheel for serviceability and correct assembly, and inflate according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse repair options and select those most appropriate to the circumstances according to workplace procedures3.2 Repair tyres and tubes according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Mount tyre to wheel or rim according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures without causing damage to components or systems3.4 Check assembled wheel for serviceability and correct assembly, and inflate according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse repair options and select those most appropriate to the circumstances according to workplace procedures3.2 Repair tyres and tubes according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Mount tyre to wheel or rim according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures without causing damage to components or systems3.4 Check assembled wheel for serviceability and correct assembly, and inflate according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and assembled wheel is presented ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of waste or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and assembled wheel is presented ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of waste or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and assembled wheel is presented ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of waste or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.
